description: Deterministic blocking gates for a hub-and-spoke orchestration plan. The Guardian fails the plan if any blocking gate is unmet.

gates.rule: Plan declares 2+ genuinely independent subtasks; a single-pass task is not forced into spokes.
Every spoke runs in fresh_session; no shared coordinator transcript or mutable scratch object across spokes.
Coordinator consumes only each spoke's final message.
Each of 2+ spokes declares AgentDefinition(description, prompt, tools, model) and is dispatched via Task.
No tool or model assigned that the spoke does not use; cheapest model that clears the bar.
Spoke failures carry failure_type, attempted_query, partial_results, suggested_alternatives.
valid_empty (access ok, empty) is distinct from access_failure; never success + [] for an access failure.
Bounded retry or alternative proposal attempted before propagation.
Continue-on-partial-failure with explicit coverage_gaps; fail-fast only if requested, with skipped spokes recorded.
Evidence tags present (one family of [CÓDIGO]/[CONFIG]/[DOC]/[INFERENCIA]/[SUPUESTO]); no invented prices; no client PII; single brand.
